REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-22-2003 - CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE COURT RECORD; LARRY BECKER, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK, RHONDA L. AQUILINA, CSR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 238 EDDY STREET #317 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. WRIT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 11/10/03, THOUGH PRIOR POSTING OF WRIT IS PERMITTED. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
